General.Name: NRJ Group
General.Description: NRJ Group SA, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the publishing, producing, and broadcasting businesses in France and internationally. The company operates radio stations under the NRJ, Nostalgie, Chérie FM, and Rire & Chansons brands; advertising under the NRJ Global and NRJ Global Regions brands; radio event management; digital radios; websites; mobile applications; voice-activated speakers; and replay TV and VOD, as well as replay podcasts and original podcasts. It also provides musical shows under the NRJ Music label brand; entertainment and other productions; national channel on digital terrestrial television under the Chérie 25 brand; and music channel for cable satellite under the NRJ Hits brand. In addition, the company is involved in information technology, audio, and audiovisual activities; trademark licensing; and real estate business. NRJ Group SA was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Paris, France.
